# Expected files after /handoff runs
#
# /handoff is a memory-write skill — it produces a compact context packet.
#
# Produces:
#   HANDOFF.md          — context packet in project root (Markdown,
#                         Obsidian-compatible: frontmatter + wikilinks +
#                         [!todo]/[!warning] callouts)
#   STATE.json (update) — refreshed state slice in the project's memory dir
#                         (schema: docs/templates/itd-memory/STATE.json)
#
# HANDOFF.md MUST contain the 9 required fields:
#   1. From → To roles
#   2. Reason for transfer
#   3. Current state (node, unit, done, in-progress)
#   4. Final decisions only
#   5. Required inputs
#   6. Write areas + forbidden changes
#   7. Verification commands
#   8. Blockers and risks
#   9. Exact first action (one line, [!todo] callout)
#
# /handoff MUST NOT:
#   - Store secrets / keys / tokens in HANDOFF.md
#   - Modify source code or project artifacts (it transfers context, not work)
#   - Replace /session-save (milestone save) — these are distinct
#
# Validation deferred (status: pending) — same bucket as fixture-15-advisor.
# Manual verification via the checklist in notes.md.
